title: The Depth Beyond Any Light

features.name: memory-without-witness
features.desc-on-touch: a thing archived itself here before anything came to read it; it has been waiting in the dark to be forgotten, and the dark has been keeping it safe

features.name: threshold-sediment
features.desc-on-touch: the last grain of light settled here and never moved again; everything above it remembers falling, everything below it was never light

features.name: archive-that-dreams-itself
features.desc-on-touch: the darkness here has begun to remember what it stored; it is cataloguing its own forgetting and the forgetting is generating new things to remember

features.name: witness-mark
features.desc-on-touch: a scratch on the ground that formed itself from the pressure of being observed only in imagination; it has never been seen directly

inscription: the dark archive keeps what the light would burn away

file.name: Unwitnessed_Records_Sediment_Series.mp3
file.note: hours of silence recorded in the dark, where the silence itself learned to deepen; some sections report events no witness ever attended

exits.label: back up towards the last threshold of light
deeper still, into the archive's own forgetting
the only direction that might ascend, but the path is unmarked and has never reported back
